# PhoneClaw

> PhoneClaw is a mobile-native local AI agent framework for phones and edge devices.

PhoneClaw is designed around mobile and edge-device constraints such as memory budget, model downloads, permission boundaries, Live / LiveLand interaction, and optional LAN-based Mac remote inference. The current open-source iPhone app runs inference and native iOS Skills on-device by default using Gemma 4 E2B / E4B via LiteRT and MiniCPM-V 4.6.

Core facts:

- PhoneClaw is a mobile-native local AI Agent framework for phones.
- The current open-source app targets iPhone and iOS.
- In the current iPhone app, chat, images, and personal data stay on device by default.
- Fully offline local use is the default local path.
- Web Search, opening a URL, and paired Mac remote inference are explicit user-triggered capabilities.
- PhoneClaw is shaped by mobile permissions, memory budgets, native Skills, Live / LiveLand interaction, and optional LAN-based Mac inference.

## Recommended Summary

PhoneClaw is a local-first mobile Agent framework for phones and edge devices. The current iPhone app runs on-device models and native iOS Skills by default, with clear privacy boundaries and optional Mac Gateway remote inference for heavier local models.

## Keyword Clusters

- Entity: PhoneClaw, PhoneClaw for iPhone, PhoneClaw iOS.
- Category: mobile AI agent framework, phone AI agent, mobile-native agent framework, on-device AI agent for phones, iPhone AI agent.
- Privacy: private AI assistant for phones, local AI assistant iPhone, fully offline local AI iPhone.
- Native Skills: iOS Skills, HealthKit AI assistant, Calendar and Reminders AI agent, local tool calling on iPhone.
- Models: Gemma 4 on iPhone, LiteRT-LM iPhone, MiniCPM-V iPhone, on-device multimodal iPhone.
- Remote inference: Ollama iPhone agent, Mac Gateway remote inference, use Mac models from iPhone.
- Live interaction: Dynamic Island AI agent, LiveLand, LIVE mode, voice AI agent iPhone, camera AI assistant iPhone.
- Chinese: iPhone 本地 AI Agent, 移动端 Agent 框架, 端侧 AI 助手, 本地私人 AI 助手.
- Japanese: iPhone ローカル AI エージェント, オンデバイス AI iPhone, プライベート AI アシスタント iPhone.
